software.title: Software Engineering
software.subtitle: Génie Logiciel
software.description: Designing, building, and maintaining software systems. From mobile apps to large-scale cloud infrastructure, software engineering transforms ideas into functional digital reality. Without the jargon: if you use an app, a software engineer built it.

study.subjects: Advanced Mathematics, Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming (C++/Java), Web Foundations.
Database Management Systems (SQL/NoSQL), Operating Systems, Software Architecture, Software Testing.
Cloud Computing, DevOps pipeline, Mobile App Development, Capstone Graduation Project (PFE).

careers.title: Backend Engineer
careers.desc: Builds the invisible logic, databases, and servers that power applications.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Standup meeting | 10:00 - Writing API logic | 14:00 - Database optimization | 16:00 - Code review

careers.title: AI Engineer
careers.desc: Integrates machine learning models into live production software systems.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Review model metrics | 11:00 - Data pipeline debugging | 14:30 - Training models | 16:30 - Deploying to cloud

energy.title: Energy Engineering
energy.subtitle: Génie Énergétique
energy.description: Focuses on clean energy production, energy efficiency, and transforming how the world powers its cities, industries, and vehicles cleanly.

study.subjects: Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Material Science, Heat Transfer fundamentals.
Renewable Energy Systems (Solar/Wind), Thermal Power Plants, Electrical Grids.
Energy Auditing, Smart Grid Management, Industrial HVAC, Hydrogen Systems (PFE).

careers.title: Renewable Energy Consultant
careers.desc: Designs commercial solar arrays and wind farm layout efficiencies.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Site data analysis | 11:00 - Client solar layout presentation | 14:00 - Grid connection simulation

computer.title: Computer Engineering
computer.subtitle: Génie Informatique
computer.description: The bridge between hardware and software. Computer engineers design everything from microprocessors to supercomputers, understanding both the physical circuitry and the code that runs on it.

study.subjects: Digital Logic, Computer Architecture, Programming Fundamentals, Discrete Math.
Operating Systems, Microprocessors, Computer Networks, Systems Programming.
VLSI Design, High-Performance Computing, Distributed Systems, PFE.

careers.title: Systems Engineer
careers.desc: Develops the core operating systems and firmware for complex computer systems.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Debugging firmware | 11:30 - Testing hardware prototypes | 14:00 - Optimizing kernel code

ai_data.title: AI & Data Science
ai_data.subtitle: Génie IA & Science des Données
ai_data.description: Teaching computers to learn from data. This field is about algorithms, statistics, and massive datasets, allowing machines to predict outcomes, recognize speech, and generate content.

study.subjects: Linear Algebra, Probability/Statistics, Python for Data Science, Databases.
Machine Learning, Data Mining, Big Data Ecosystems (Hadoop/Spark), Optimization.
Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, AI Ethics.

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.desc: Analyzes complex datasets to extract insights and build predictive models.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Cleaning datasets | 11:00 - Training ML models | 15:00 - Visualizing data trends for stakeholders

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity & Cloud
cybersecurity.subtitle: Génie Cybersécurité & Cloud
cybersecurity.description: Protecting the digital world. This field focuses on defending networks, applications, and cloud infrastructures from malicious attacks, ensuring data privacy and system integrity.

study.subjects: Network Fundamentals, Cryptography, Linux Administration, Secure Coding.
Ethical Hacking, Network Security, Cloud Architecture (AWS/Azure), Malware Analysis.
Incident Response, Cloud Security, Penetration Testing, Risk Management.

careers.title: Penetration Tester
careers.desc: Legally hacks into systems to find vulnerabilities before the bad guys do.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Scanning network ports | 11:30 - Exploiting web vulnerabilities | 15:00 - Writing security reports

careers.title: Cloud Security Architect
careers.desc: Designs secure cloud infrastructure for companies scaling globally.
careers.schedule: 10:00 - Reviewing AWS permissions | 13:00 - Setting up firewalls | 16:00 - Automating security protocols

network.title: Network & Telecom
network.subtitle: Génie Réseaux & Télécommunications
network.description: Connecting the world. Network engineers design, implement, and manage the complex communication networks—from local LANs to massive global ISPs and 5G/6G infrastructures.

study.subjects: Signal Processing, TCP/IP Protocols, Routing & Switching, Programming.
Wireless Networks (4G/5G), Network Virtualization (SDN/NFV), VoIP, Optical Networks.
Advanced Routing, IoT Networks, Telecom Network Planning, PFE.

careers.title: Network Architect
careers.desc: Designs complex data communication networks for large enterprises or ISPs.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Designing network topology | 11:00 - Configuring core routers | 14:00 - Troubleshooting latency issues

embedded.title: Embedded Systems & IoT
embedded.subtitle: Systèmes Embarqués & IoT
embedded.description: Putting computers into everything. This field involves programming the 'hidden' computers inside cars, washing machines, medical devices, and smart home IoT sensors.

study.subjects: C/C++ Programming, Electronics, Microcontrollers, Digital Systems.
Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOS), Sensors & Actuators, IoT Protocols (MQTT), FPGA.
Embedded Linux, Wireless Sensor Networks, Autonomous Systems, PFE.

careers.title: Embedded Software Engineer
careers.desc: Writes low-level code that directly controls hardware components.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Writing C code | 11:00 - Testing on physical hardware board | 14:30 - Debugging memory leaks

electrical.title: Electrical & Automation
electrical.subtitle: Génie Électrique & Automatisme
electrical.description: Powering the modern world and automating industries. Covers everything from high-voltage electrical grids to programming industrial robots and factory assembly lines.

study.subjects: Electromagnetism, Circuit Theory, Power Electronics, Control Systems.
Electrical Machines, Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), Industrial Automation, High Voltage.
Supervisory Control (SCADA), Smart Grids, Advanced Control Theory, PFE.

careers.title: Automation Engineer
careers.desc: Programs and maintains the robotic and automated systems in manufacturing plants.
careers.schedule: 08:00 - Factory floor inspection | 10:30 - Programming PLCs | 14:00 - Optimizing assembly line speed

electronics.title: Industrial Electronics
electronics.subtitle: Électronique Industrielle & Instrumentation
electronics.description: The foundation of modern hardware. Focuses on designing, building, and testing electronic circuits, sensors, and instrumentation used in everything from medical imaging to aviation.

study.subjects: Analog Electronics, Digital Electronics, Signal Processing, Instrumentation.
Microprocessors, Power Electronics, PCB Design, Sensors and Measurement Systems.
Advanced Instrumentation, RF/Microwave Engineering, Reliability Analysis, PFE.

careers.title: Electronics Design Engineer
careers.desc: Designs the printed circuit boards (PCBs) and electronic components for tech products.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Designing PCB layouts | 11:30 - Simulating circuit loads | 14:00 - Soldering and testing prototypes

mechatronics.title: Mechatronics Engineering
mechatronics.subtitle: Mécatronique
mechatronics.description: The ultimate multidisciplinary field: a seamless blend of mechanical engineering, electronics, computer science, and control systems. Think drones, robots, and self-driving cars.

study.subjects: Mechanics, Circuit Analysis, C Programming, CAD Modeling.
Kinematics/Dynamics, Microcontrollers, Sensors & Actuators, Control Systems.
Robotics, Machine Vision, Advanced Mechatronic System Design, PFE.

careers.title: Robotics Engineer
careers.desc: Designs, builds, and programs robotic systems for manufacturing, space, or medical use.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - CAD modeling of a robot arm | 11:30 - Writing control algorithms in Python/C++ | 15:00 - Testing physical movement

telecom_systems.title: Telecom Systems Engineering
telecom_systems.subtitle: Systèmes de Télécommunications
telecom_systems.description: Focuses on the physical transmission of data. How do we send a high-definition video from a server in California to a mobile phone in Tunis using invisible electromagnetic waves? That's Telecom Systems.

study.subjects: Electromagnetism, Signal Theory, Analog/Digital Communications, Mathematics.
Antenna Design, Microwave Engineering, Optical Fiber Communications, Information Theory.
Satellite Communications, Radar Systems, Mobile Networks Architecture, PFE.

careers.title: RF (Radio Frequency) Engineer
careers.desc: Designs the antennas and radio systems used in mobile networks and satellites.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Simulating signal propagation | 11:00 - Testing antenna arrays | 14:00 - Field testing cell tower coverage

mechanical.title: Mechanical Engineering
mechanical.subtitle: Génie Mécanique
mechanical.description: The mother of all engineering. Mechanical engineers design, analyze, and manufacture everything that moves—from tiny micro-sensors to massive jet engines and power plants.

study.subjects: Statics & Dynamics, Material Science, Thermodynamics, CAD (SolidWorks/AutoCAD).
Fluid Mechanics, Heat Transfer, Machine Design, Manufacturing Processes.
Finite Element Analysis (FEA), Advanced Thermodynamics, Systems Dynamics, PFE.

careers.title: Mechanical Design Engineer
careers.desc: Creates the structural designs for products, ensuring they won't break under stress.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Designing parts in SolidWorks | 11:00 - Running stress simulations | 14:00 - Reviewing prototypes with manufacturing

industrial.title: Industrial & Logistics
industrial.subtitle: Génie Industriel & Logistique
industrial.description: Making systems work better. Industrial engineers optimize complex processes, supply chains, and manufacturing plants to eliminate waste, save time, and improve efficiency.

study.subjects: Operations Research, Statistics, Production Basics, Economics.
Supply Chain Management, Lean Manufacturing (Six Sigma), Ergonomics, Quality Control.
Advanced Logistics, Facility Planning, Simulation of Industrial Systems, PFE.

careers.title: Supply Chain Manager
careers.desc: Oversees the entire flow of goods from raw materials to the final customer.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Reviewing inventory algorithms | 11:30 - Negotiating with international shippers | 14:00 - Optimizing warehouse layouts

careers.title: Process Engineer
careers.desc: Implements Lean strategies to make factories produce items faster and cheaper.
careers.schedule: 08:00 - Factory floor time-studies | 11:00 - Analyzing bottleneck data | 15:00 - Training staff on new safety protocols

aeronautical.title: Aeronautical Engineering
aeronautical.subtitle: Génie Aéronautique
aeronautical.description: The science of flight. Aeronautical engineers design, test, and manufacture aircraft, helicopters, and UAVs (drones), focusing heavily on aerodynamics and propulsion.

study.subjects: Fluid Dynamics, Thermodynamics, Mechanics of Materials, Flight Physics.
Aerodynamics, Aircraft Structures, Propulsion Systems, Avionics.
Flight Dynamics and Control, Aircraft Design, Aircraft Maintenance, PFE.

careers.title: Aerodynamics Engineer
careers.desc: Uses computational software and wind tunnels to design efficient aircraft wings and bodies.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Running CFD simulations | 13:00 - Analyzing wind tunnel data | 15:30 - Modifying wing geometries

automotive.title: Automotive Engineering
automotive.subtitle: Génie Automobile
automotive.description: Designing the vehicles of tomorrow. Blends mechanical, electrical, and software engineering to create safer, faster, and more eco-friendly cars, heavily focusing on the EV (Electric Vehicle) revolution.

study.subjects: Vehicle Dynamics, Thermodynamics, Mechanics, CAD.
Internal Combustion Engines, Electric Powertrains, Automotive Electronics, Chassis Design.
Battery Management Systems, Autonomous Driving Tech, Crash Safety Analysis, PFE.

careers.title: Powertrain Engineer
careers.desc: Develops the engines or electric motors that propel the vehicle.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Testing battery thermal efficiency | 11:30 - Calibrating motor software | 14:00 - Analyzing dyno test results

civil.title: Civil Engineering
civil.subtitle: Génie Civil
civil.description: Building the physical world. Civil engineers design and oversee the construction of bridges, highways, skyscrapers, dams, and modern city infrastructures.

study.subjects: Structural Analysis, Strength of Materials, Soil Mechanics, Surveying.
Reinforced Concrete Design, Steel Structures, Highway Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering.
Construction Management, Seismic Design, Bridge Engineering, PFE.

careers.title: Structural Engineer
careers.desc: Calculates the loads and stresses to ensure a skyscraper won't collapse during an earthquake.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Reviewing architectural blueprints | 11:00 - Calculating load bearing weights | 14:00 - Visiting construction site

careers.title: Construction Manager
careers.desc: Oversees the actual building process, managing budgets, timelines, and safety.
careers.schedule: 07:00 - Site safety briefing | 10:00 - Coordinating cement deliveries | 13:00 - Budget review meeting

hydraulic.title: Hydraulic & Environment
hydraulic.subtitle: Génie Hydraulique & Environnement
hydraulic.description: Managing the world's most precious resource: water. Focuses on dams, irrigation, flood defense, and treating wastewater to protect the environment.

study.subjects: Fluid Mechanics, Hydrology, Environmental Chemistry, Topography.
Water Treatment Processes, Open Channel Hydraulics, Groundwater Modeling, Pipe Networks.
Dam Engineering, Coastal Engineering, Environmental Impact Assessment, PFE.

careers.title: Water Resources Engineer
careers.desc: Designs systems to manage drinking water distribution and treat wastewater.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Analyzing watershed data | 11:30 - Designing pumping stations | 15:00 - Environmental compliance checks

geomatics.title: Geomatics & Topography
geomatics.subtitle: Géomatique & Topographie
geomatics.description: The science of mapping the Earth. Uses satellites, drones, and GPS technology to collect, analyze, and display geographic data (GIS) used in city planning, navigation, and defense.

study.subjects: Cartography, Geodesy, Mathematics, Basic Programming.
Geographic Information Systems (GIS), Remote Sensing, Photogrammetry, Spatial Databases.
Drone Mapping, Satellite Image Processing, Web Mapping, PFE.

careers.title: GIS Analyst
careers.desc: Creates complex interactive maps and spatial models to help businesses and governments make decisions.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Processing drone satellite imagery | 11:00 - Building spatial database queries | 14:00 - Creating city zoning maps

chemical.title: Chemical & Process Eng
chemical.subtitle: Génie Chimique & Procédés
chemical.description: Turning raw materials into valuable products on a massive scale. Chemical engineers design the plants that produce medicines, plastics, fuels, and cosmetics.

study.subjects: Organic/Inorganic Chemistry, Thermodynamics, Mass and Energy Balances, Fluid Mechanics.
Chemical Reaction Engineering, Heat Transfer, Separation Processes, Process Control.
Plant Design, Industrial Safety, Biochemical Engineering, PFE.

careers.title: Process Engineer
careers.desc: Scales up chemical reactions from small lab beakers to massive factory reactors.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Monitoring reactor temperatures | 11:00 - Optimizing chemical yields | 14:00 - Safety compliance review

petroleum.title: Petroleum & Mining Eng
petroleum.subtitle: Génie Pétrolier & Minier
petroleum.description: Extracting the Earth's hidden resources. Focuses on finding and producing oil, natural gas, and essential minerals safely and efficiently.

study.subjects: Geology, Petrophysics, Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics.
Drilling Engineering, Reservoir Engineering, Mining Methods, Geomechanics.
Production Engineering, Well Testing, Resource Economics, PFE.

careers.title: Reservoir Engineer
careers.desc: Uses computer models to figure out how much oil/gas is underground and the best way to extract it.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Analyzing seismic data | 11:30 - Running fluid flow simulations | 15:00 - Planning extraction rates

careers.title: Drilling Engineer
careers.desc: Designs the technical plans to drill deep into the earth safely.
careers.schedule: 07:00 - Rig safety meeting | 10:00 - Monitoring well pressure | 14:00 - Designing mud systems

textile.title: Textile Engineering
textile.subtitle: Génie Textile
textile.description: The science of fabrics. Combines chemistry and mechanical engineering to create everything from everyday clothing to bulletproof vests, medical fabrics, and aerospace composites.

study.subjects: Polymer Chemistry, Textile Fibers, Mechanics, Yarn Manufacturing.
Fabric Structure (Weaving/Knitting), Textile Dyeing & Finishing, Quality Control.
Smart Textiles, Technical Textiles (Medical/Automotive), Supply Chain, PFE.

careers.title: Textile R&D Engineer
careers.desc: Invents new fabrics, like sports materials that wick sweat better or eco-friendly biodegradable fabrics.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Testing tensile strength | 11:00 - Mixing new chemical dyes | 14:00 - Analyzing microscopic fiber structure

biomedical.title: Biomedical Engineering
biomedical.subtitle: Génie Biologique & Biomédical
biomedical.description: Engineering for the human body. Focuses on designing medical devices like MRI machines, pacemakers, artificial organs, and advanced prosthetics.

study.subjects: Human Anatomy & Physiology, Cell Biology, Circuit Analysis, Biomaterials.
Medical Imaging (X-Ray/MRI), Biomechanics, Bio-instrumentation, Biosignal Processing.
Prosthetic Design, Tissue Engineering, Medical Device Regulation, PFE.

careers.title: Medical Device Engineer
careers.desc: Designs, builds, and tests medical equipment used in hospitals and surgeries.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - CAD modeling a new surgical tool | 11:30 - Testing biocompatibility of plastics | 14:00 - FDA/CE regulatory paperwork

agricultural.title: Agricultural Engineering
agricultural.subtitle: Ingénierie Agronomique
agricultural.description: Securing the future of food. Uses technology, biology, and engineering to improve farming efficiency, crop yields, and sustainable agriculture in a changing climate.

study.subjects: Botany, Soil Science, Climatology, Agricultural Machinery Basics.
Genetics, Plant Pathology, Irrigation Systems, Animal Production.
Precision Agriculture, Agribusiness, Sustainable Farming Systems, PFE.

careers.title: Precision Agriculture Engineer
careers.desc: Uses drones, sensors, and GPS to optimize water and fertilizer use on large farms.
careers.schedule: 08:00 - Flying drone over crops | 10:30 - Analyzing soil moisture data | 14:00 - Programming automated irrigation

food.title: Food Industry Eng
food.subtitle: Génie Agroalimentaire
food.description: The science of what we eat. Focuses on the processing, preservation, packaging, and safety of food products on a massive industrial scale.

study.subjects: Food Chemistry, Microbiology, Thermodynamics, Food Processing Basics.
Food Preservation Tech, Unit Operations, Quality Control (HACCP), Packaging.
Industrial Production Management, Food Innovation/R&D, Food Safety Laws, PFE.

careers.title: Food Product Developer (R&D)
careers.desc: Creates new food products, finding ways to make them healthier, tastier, and longer-lasting.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Experimenting with natural preservatives | 11:30 - Running taste panels | 14:00 - Scaling recipe for factory production

applied_math.title: Applied Math & Modeling
applied_math.subtitle: Mathématiques Appliquées & Modélisation
applied_math.description: Translating the real world into equations. Uses high-level mathematics to model complex systems—from stock market predictions to weather forecasting and cryptography.

study.subjects: Advanced Calculus, Measure Theory, Linear Algebra, Algorithmic Logic.
Stochastic Processes, Numerical Analysis, Optimization, Financial Mathematics.
Complex Systems Modeling, Operations Research, Cryptography, PFE.

schools.name: ENIT
schools.program: Modélisation pour l'Industrie et les Services

careers.title: Quantitative Analyst (Quant)
careers.desc: Uses mathematical models to help banks and hedge funds price risks and trade stocks automatically.
careers.schedule: 08:30 - Writing trading algorithms | 11:00 - Analyzing statistical market anomalies | 14:00 - Backtesting models

physics.title: Advanced Techniques & Physics
physics.subtitle: Techniques Avancées / Physique Appliquée
physics.description: Pushing the boundaries of science. Applied physicists work at the edge of human knowledge, developing nanotechnology, quantum systems, lasers, and advanced materials.

study.subjects: Quantum Mechanics, Statistical Physics, Electromagnetism, Material Science.
Solid State Physics, Photonics/Lasers, Nanotechnology, Computational Physics.
Advanced Materials, Plasma Physics, Semiconductor Device Design, PFE.

careers.title: R&D Scientist / Engineer
careers.desc: Works in high-tech labs designing the underlying physical tech for next-gen sensors or quantum chips.
careers.schedule: 09:00 - Operating electron microscope | 13:00 - Analyzing photon emission data | 15:30 - Writing research paper / patent
